tests.name: simple while loop
tests.code: int i = 0; int s = 0; while (i < 3) { s += i; i += 1; } print(s);

tests.name: simple for loop
tests.code: int s = 0; for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 1) { s += i; } print(s);

tests.name: for loop block locals are released each iteration
tests.code: int s = 0; for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 1) { float throttle = 2.0; s += throttle; } print(s);

tests.name: break in loop
tests.code_disabled: int i = 0; int s = 0; while (true) { if (i == 4) { break; } s = s + i; i = i + 1; } print(s);

tests.name: continue in loop
tests.code_disabled: int i = 0; int s = 0; while (i < 5) { i = i + 1; if (i == 3) { continue; } s = s + i; } print(s);
